requirement_topic.en: Energy Efficiency Labelling for Lighting (Chile Ministry of Energy / SEC)
requirement_topic.zh: 照明产品能效标签（智利能源部 / SEC）
requirement_topic.zht: 照明產品能效標籤（智利能源部 / SEC）

summary.en: Chile operates an energy efficiency labelling regime (etiqueta de eficiencia energetica) administered by the Ministry of Energy together with SEC and the Agencia de Sostenibilidad Energetica. For lighting products in scope, the label communicates an A-G style efficiency class and luminous efficacy (lm/W) information to consumers at the point of sale. The label is issued in connection with the SEC certification/approval process, and the efficiency class is derived from tested performance against the applicable NCh/IEC performance method (e.g., IEC 62612 / IEC 62560 for self-ballasted LED lamps). Where a luminaire class is in scope, the labelling obligation must be met before the product is offered for retail sale in Chile.
summary.zh: 智利实行由能源部联同 SEC 及能源可持续发展局（Agencia de Sostenibilidad Energetica）管理的能效标签制度（etiqueta de eficiencia energetica）。对适用范围内的照明产品，标签在销售点向消费者传达 A-G 式能效等级及光效（lm/W）信息。标签结合 SEC 认证/核准流程发放，能效等级依据适用 NCh/IEC 性能方法（如自镇流 LED 灯的 IEC 62612 / IEC 62560）的检测性能得出。在灯具类别属适用范围时，须在产品于智利零售销售前满足标签义务。
summary.zht: 智利實行由能源部聯同 SEC 及能源可持續發展局（Agencia de Sostenibilidad Energetica）管理的能效標籤制度（etiqueta de eficiencia energetica）。對適用範圍內的照明產品，標籤在銷售點向消費者傳達 A-G 式能效等級及光效（lm/W）信息。標籤結合 SEC 認證/核准流程發放，能效等級依據適用 NCh/IEC 性能方法（如自鎮流 LED 燈的 IEC 62612 / IEC 62560）的檢測性能得出。在燈具類別屬適用範圍時，須在產品於智利零售銷售前滿足標籤義務。

standards_or_laws: Chile Ministry of Energy — Programa de Etiquetado de Eficiencia Energetica (energy efficiency labelling for lighting products)
SEC certification protocol for lighting products (efficiency label issued in connection with SEC approval)
IEC 62612 / IEC 62560 (performance/safety methods adopted as NCh for self-ballasted LED lamps)

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB 30255-2019 (Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires), defining three energy efficiency grades: Grade 1 (highest) ≥90 lm/W, Grade 2 ≥80 lm/W, Grade 3 ≥70 lm/W, with Grade 3 the minimum for CN market entry. The China Energy Label (CEL) registration with CQC/CECP is mandatory for GB 30255-covered products and is administered by SAMR. GB 30255 sets binding minimum efficacy thresholds for the Chinese market.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB 30255-2019（LED 室内照明产品能效要求），规定三个能效等级：1 级（最高）≥90 lm/W、2 级 ≥80 lm/W、3 级 ≥70 lm/W，3 级为中国市场准入最低要求。中国能效标识（CEL）须向 CQC/CECP 注册，对 GB 30255 涵盖产品为强制要求，由市场监管总局（SAMR）管理。GB 30255 为中国市场设定了约束性最低能效阈值。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB 30255-2019（LED 室內照明產品能效要求），規定三個能效等級：1 級（最高）≥90 lm/W、2 級 ≥80 lm/W、3 級 ≥70 lm/W，3 級為中國市場准入最低要求。中國能效標識（CEL）須向 CQC/CECP 注冊，對 GB 30255 涵蓋產品為強制要求，由市場監管總局（SAMR）管理。GB 30255 為中國市場設定了約束性最低能效閾值。

standards_or_laws: GB 30255-2019 — Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires (SAC/SAMR)
China Energy Label (CEL) scheme — administered by SAMR/CQC/CECP

gap.en: Chile has no EU-style Ecodesign minimum-performance ban (it does not, in general, prohibit lower-efficacy lamps from market entry the way the EU Ecodesign Regulation does); instead its principal lever is consumer-facing efficiency labelling tied to the SEC approval process. The Chilean efficiency class and the CN CEL grade are calculated against different reference methods and are not mutually recognised, so a CN Grade does not determine the Chilean class — the product must be tested and labelled separately for Chile. Chinese manufacturers must (1) confirm whether their specific lighting product class is currently in scope of the Chilean labelling programme; (2) test efficacy under the Chile-accepted IEC method; (3) obtain and display the Chilean energy label issued through the SEC/Ministry of Energy process. A CN CEL registration does not substitute for the Chilean label.
gap.zh: 智利没有欧盟式生态设计最低性能准入禁令（其一般不像欧盟生态设计法规那样禁止低能效灯具进入市场）；其主要手段是与 SEC 核准流程挂钩、面向消费者的能效标签。智利能效等级与中国 CEL 等级依据不同参考方法计算且不互认，故中国等级不能决定智利等级——产品须为智利单独检测并贴标。中国制造商须：（1）确认其具体照明产品类别当前是否属于智利标签计划范围；（2）按智利接受的 IEC 方法检测光效；（3）取得并展示经 SEC/能源部流程发放的智利能效标签。中国 CEL 注册不可替代智利标签。
gap.zht: 智利沒有歐盟式生態設計最低性能准入禁令（其一般不像歐盟生態設計法規那樣禁止低能效燈具進入市場）；其主要手段是與 SEC 核准流程掛鈎、面向消費者的能效標籤。智利能效等級與中國 CEL 等級依據不同參考方法計算且不互認，故中國等級不能決定智利等級——產品須為智利單獨檢測並貼標。中國製造商須：（1）確認其具體照明產品類別當前是否屬於智利標籤計劃範圍；（2）按智利接受的 IEC 方法檢測光效；（3）取得並展示經 SEC/能源部流程發放的智利能效標籤。中國 CEL 注冊不可替代智利標籤。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where in scope — Chilean energy efficiency label (Ministry of Energy / SEC) required before retail sale for in-scope lighting product classes; no EU-style minimum-efficacy market ban
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 30255-2019 Grade 3 (≥70 lm/W) minimum for CN entry; China Energy Label (CEL) registration with CQC/CECP required

source.publisher: Ministerio de Energia de Chile (Chile Ministry of Energy)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chile regulates lighting efficiency primarily through a consumer energy efficiency label tied to the SEC/Ministry of Energy process, not through an EU-style minimum-efficacy market ban. Where the product class is in scope, the Chilean label must be obtained and displayed before retail sale. The Chilean efficiency class and the Chinese CEL grade use different reference methods and are not mutually recognised, so a CN Grade does not establish the Chilean class — verify current Chilean labelling scope and test under the Chile-accepted IEC method.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 智利主要通过与 SEC/能源部流程挂钩的消费者能效标签来规范照明能效，而非欧盟式最低能效准入禁令。在产品类别属适用范围时，须在零售销售前取得并展示智利标签。智利能效等级与中国 CEL 等级采用不同参考方法且不互认，故中国等级不能确立智利等级——请核查智利现行标签范围并按智利接受的 IEC 方法检测。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 智利主要通過與 SEC/能源部流程掛鈎的消費者能效標籤來規範照明能效，而非歐盟式最低能效准入禁令。在產品類別屬適用範圍時，須在零售銷售前取得並展示智利標籤。智利能效等級與中國 CEL 等級採用不同參考方法且不互認，故中國等級不能確立智利等級——請核查智利現行標籤範圍並按智利接受的 IEC 方法檢測。

requirement_topic.en: Performance Testing and Efficacy Declaration for SEC Approval (Chile)
requirement_topic.zh: 用于 SEC 核准的性能检测与能效声明（智利）
requirement_topic.zht: 用於 SEC 核准的性能檢測與能效聲明（智利）

summary.en: To obtain SEC product certification and the associated efficiency label, the declared performance of an LED lamp/luminaire (luminous flux, luminous efficacy in lm/W, rated power, colour temperature, and rated lifetime) must be substantiated by test reports against the IEC performance methods adopted by INN as Chilean NCh standards (e.g., IEC 62612 for self-ballasted LED lamps performance, IEC 62560 for safety). The test reports must come from a laboratory accepted by the SEC-authorized certifier. The declared efficiency feeds directly into the energy label class. Chile does not impose binding EU-Ecodesign-style minimum CRI, minimum lifetime, or minimum power-factor market-entry thresholds horizontally; rather the declared values must be truthful and substantiated for the label and SEC file.
summary.zh: 为取得 SEC 产品认证及相关能效标签，LED 灯/灯具的声明性能（光通量、光效 lm/W、额定功率、色温及额定寿命）须由依据 INN 采纳为智利 NCh 标准的 IEC 性能方法（如自镇流 LED 灯性能 IEC 62612、安全 IEC 62560）出具的检测报告予以证实。检测报告须来自 SEC 授权认证机构接受的实验室。声明的能效直接决定能效标签等级。智利不横向施加欧盟生态设计式的最低显色指数、最低寿命或最低功率因数市场准入阈值；但声明值须真实并为标签及 SEC 档案提供依据。
summary.zht: 為取得 SEC 產品認證及相關能效標籤，LED 燈/燈具的聲明性能（光通量、光效 lm/W、額定功率、色溫及額定壽命）須由依據 INN 採納為智利 NCh 標準的 IEC 性能方法（如自鎮流 LED 燈性能 IEC 62612、安全 IEC 62560）出具的檢測報告予以證實。檢測報告須來自 SEC 授權認證機構接受的實驗室。聲明的能效直接決定能效標籤等級。智利不橫向施加歐盟生態設計式的最低顯色指數、最低壽命或最低功率因數市場准入閾值；但聲明值須真實並為標籤及 SEC 檔案提供依據。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62612 — Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting — Performance requirements (adopted as NCh by INN)
IEC 62560 — Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services > 50 V — Safety specifications (adopted as NCh by INN)
SEC certification protocol — performance declaration and label class derivation

summary.en: In China, performance of self-ballasted LED lamps is assessed under GB/T 24908 (Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services — Performance requirements) and energy efficiency under GB 30255-2019, with CEL registration based on tested lm/W against absolute grade thresholds. CCC and CEL test reports are produced by CNAS/CMA-accredited Chinese laboratories. These Chinese performance test reports and the CEL grade are not accepted as substitutes within the Chilean SEC certification and Ministry of Energy labelling process.
summary.zh: 在中国，自镇流 LED 灯的性能依据 GB/T 24908（普通照明用自镇流 LED 灯性能要求）评估，能效依据 GB 30255-2019 评估，CEL 注册基于检测得到的 lm/W 与绝对等级阈值比较。CCC 与 CEL 检测报告由中国 CNAS/CMA 认可实验室出具。这些中国性能检测报告及 CEL 等级在智利 SEC 认证及能源部标签流程中不被接受为替代。
summary.zht: 在中國，自鎮流 LED 燈的性能依據 GB/T 24908（普通照明用自鎮流 LED 燈性能要求）評估，能效依據 GB 30255-2019 評估，CEL 注冊基於檢測得到的 lm/W 與絕對等級閾值比較。CCC 與 CEL 檢測報告由中國 CNAS/CMA 認可實驗室出具。這些中國性能檢測報告及 CEL 等級在智利 SEC 認證及能源部標籤流程中不被接受為替代。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 24908-2014 — Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services — Performance requirements (SAC/SAMR)
GB 30255-2019 — Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires (SAC/SAMR)

gap.en: Both markets rely on tested lm/W and lamp performance, and the underlying IEC methods (IEC 62612 family) are broadly aligned with GB/T 24908 — so the physics of testing overlaps. The gap is procedural and jurisdictional: Chile requires the performance dossier to be filed within the SEC certification process with a label class derived per the Chilean programme, and the reports must be acceptable to the SEC-authorized certifier; Chinese CEL/CCC reports are not directly transferable. Unlike the EU, Chile does not horizontally mandate minimum CRI, minimum 6,000 h lifetime, or minimum 0.9 power factor as market-entry gates — these are declared values rather than binding thresholds. Manufacturers should confirm the exact NCh editions in force and whether the chosen Chinese lab's reports are accepted by the certifier, otherwise re-testing in a Chile-accepted laboratory is required.
gap.zh: 两个市场都依赖检测得到的 lm/W 及灯性能，且底层 IEC 方法（IEC 62612 系列）与 GB/T 24908 大致一致——故检测物理基础有重叠。差距在于程序与司法管辖：智利要求性能档案在 SEC 认证流程内归档，标签等级按智利计划得出，报告须为 SEC 授权认证机构所接受；中国 CEL/CCC 报告不可直接转用。与欧盟不同，智利不横向强制最低显色指数、最低 6,000 小时寿命或最低 0.9 功率因数作为市场准入门槛——这些为声明值而非约束性阈值。制造商应确认现行 NCh 版本及所选中国实验室报告是否为认证机构接受，否则须在智利接受的实验室重新检测。
gap.zht: 兩個市場都依賴檢測得到的 lm/W 及燈性能，且底層 IEC 方法（IEC 62612 系列）與 GB/T 24908 大致一致——故檢測物理基礎有重疊。差距在於程序與司法管轄：智利要求性能檔案在 SEC 認證流程內歸檔，標籤等級按智利計劃得出，報告須為 SEC 授權認證機構所接受；中國 CEL/CCC 報告不可直接轉用。與歐盟不同，智利不橫向強制最低顯色指數、最低 6,000 小時壽命或最低 0.9 功率因數作為市場准入門檻——這些為聲明值而非約束性閾值。製造商應確認現行 NCh 版本及所選中國實驗室報告是否為認證機構接受，否則須在智利接受的實驗室重新檢測。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (documentation) — performance/efficacy test reports against Chile-adopted NCh/IEC methods required within the SEC certification and energy label process; no horizontal minimum CRI/lifetime/power-factor market ban
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB/T 24908 performance and GB 30255-2019 efficiency testing with CEL registration required for the CN market

source.publisher: Superintendencia de Electricidad y Combustibles (SEC), Chile

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chilean SEC approval and the energy label require a substantiated performance dossier (lm/W, flux, power, lifetime) tested against INN-adopted IEC methods such as IEC 62612 / IEC 62560, filed with an SEC-authorized certifier. The IEC test physics overlaps with China's GB/T 24908, but Chinese CEL/CCC reports are not directly transferable and Chile does not impose EU-style horizontal minimum CRI/lifetime/power-factor gates. Confirm current NCh editions and whether the chosen lab's reports are accepted; otherwise re-test in a Chile-accepted laboratory.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 智利 SEC 核准及能效标签要求提供经证实的性能档案（lm/W、光通量、功率、寿命），依据 INN 采纳的 IEC 方法（如 IEC 62612 / IEC 62560）检测，并向 SEC 授权认证机构归档。IEC 检测物理基础与中国 GB/T 24908 有重叠，但中国 CEL/CCC 报告不可直接转用，且智利不施加欧盟式横向最低显色指数/寿命/功率因数门槛。请确认现行 NCh 版本及所选实验室报告是否被接受；否则须在智利接受的实验室重新检测。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 智利 SEC 核准及能效標籤要求提供經證實的性能檔案（lm/W、光通量、功率、壽命），依據 INN 採納的 IEC 方法（如 IEC 62612 / IEC 62560）檢測，並向 SEC 授權認證機構歸檔。IEC 檢測物理基礎與中國 GB/T 24908 有重疊，但中國 CEL/CCC 報告不可直接轉用，且智利不施加歐盟式橫向最低顯色指數/壽命/功率因數門檻。請確認現行 NCh 版本及所選實驗室報告是否被接受；否則須在智利接受的實驗室重新檢測。
